name: Forgetful Drops
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Access Member of a secret society

These innocuous, colorless drops can be poured directly into a victim's mouth, or slipped into their food or drink. They initially haze a victim's mind slightly, making them easier to fool; in later stages, they can lead to the victim entering a murderous state. Secret societies use these drops to befuddle a target or to frame them for violence.

Saving Throw

Onset 5 minutes

Maximum Duration 1 hour

Stage 1 Stupefied 1 (10 minutes)

Stage 2 stupefied 1 and Clumsy 1 (20 minutes)

Stage 3 stupefied 1, clumsy 1, and (30 minutes)
